initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    district.A2 AS district_name,
    district.A3 AS state,
    ((district.A11 - district.A10) / district.A10) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM 
    loan
    JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
    JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE 
    loan.status IN ('A', 'B')
GROUP BY 
    district.district_id;

SELECT 
    district.A2 AS district_name,
    district.A3 AS state,
    ((district.A11 - district.A10) / district.A10) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM 
    loan
JOIN 
    account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN 
    district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE 
    loan.status IN ('A', 'B');

SELECT 
    district.A2 AS district_name,
    district.A3 AS state,
    ((district.A11 - district.A10) / district.A10) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment_1995_to_1996
FROM loan
JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE loan.status IN ('A', 'B')
GROUP BY district.district_id;

SELECT 
    district.A2 AS district_name,
    district.A3 AS state_name,
    ((district.A11 - district.A10) / district.A10) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM loan
JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE loan.status IN ('A', 'B')
GROUP BY district.district_id;

SELECT 
    district.A2 AS district_name,
    district.A3 AS state,
    ((district.A11 - district.A10) / district.A10) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM loan
JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE loan.status IN ('A', 'B');
